title: UX latency resolution: reduce perceived >0.2s waiting on route entries and overlay opens
summary: 주요 화면 진입과 모달/시트 열기에서 체감되는 >0.2s 대기를 production-like 환경 기준으로 줄인다. targeted warm-up, cache reuse, 선택적 prefetch 개선을 FE-only로 적용하며, 기존 MVP 계약을 변경하지 않는다.
goal: 사용자가 집밥 앱의 주요 화면 진입과 모달/시트 열기에서 느끼는 >0.2s 대기를 production-like 환경 측정 기준으로 줄인다.

owners.codex: stage1 orchestration, authority_precheck (if needed), stage5 design review, stage6 PR review, evidence/closeout validation

out_of_scope: Anchor screen structural/transition model changes without authority review
New data fetching library (React Query/SWR) without explicit decision
Global prefetch toggle — route-by-route evidence-based decisions only
Claiming final success from next dev timing alone
open_questions: For each prefetch={false} target, is the current setting still serving a real regression guard or historical carryover?
If repeated shared-data pain remains after Phase 4, is a dedicated cache library allowed?
notes: FE-only latency slice. RALPLAN-DR approved (Architect APPROVE, Critic APPROVE). Stage 2/3 are N/A. Stage 4 implementation is Claude-owned. Codex handles authority_precheck (if needed), Stage 5/6 review, and evidence validation only.
